# Accessibility Skill

Every generated UI must satisfy accessibility requirements.

Checklist

## Images

- alt attribute required

## Buttons

- descriptive text
- keyboard accessible

## Forms

- label for every field
- aria-describedby where needed
- proper validation messages

## Navigation

- keyboard accessible
- logical tab order

## Headings

- one H1
- hierarchical headings

## Colors

- sufficient contrast

## Interactive Elements

- visible focus indicator

## ARIA

Use only when semantic HTML cannot solve the problem.

## Screen Readers

Every page should be understandable without vision.

## Final Validation

Before completing:

- Keyboard navigation works
- Focus visible
- Semantic HTML used
- Accessible forms
- Accessible buttons
